problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: Combining BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
